title: rubus hirtus var. substellatiflorus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. substellatiflorus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a variant of the Rubus hirtus species, a type of flowering raspberry plant native to the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help to soothe various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. substellatiflorus include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional medicine, and it can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
